data.name: 夏日海灘
data.detailed_description:
《夏日海灘》是《性感沙灘》的精神續作，一款成人3D戀愛模擬遊戲。

高中畢業、對未來毫無頭緒的那個夏天，你來到遠離本土的海邊小城——南濱港。
原本想著靠在姨媽開的小水吧打工輕鬆混日子，卻在下車後就遇上行李被偷、房租被坑、日薪被壓的「南濱港式歡迎儀式」。
本以為人生要變成「垃圾處理組」的日常，卻沒想到——
這一切，正是改變命運的開始。

在這裡，你將：
◆ 與多位性格迥異的女孩發展關係
淺野美咲：嘴硬心軟、對男人不信任的表妹。冷臉毒舌，卻會在深夜敲響你的房門。
水野夏樹：成熟開朗的姐姐型角色，能讓氣氛瞬間輕快起來。
小澤葵：神秘少女，對你有著莫名的親近感，像貓一樣黏人。
大島朱美：灑脫不羈，喜歡自由的健身教練，熱愛大海。
小澤沙耶香：知性短髮，溫和內斂，喜歡獨處的書店女店員。
還有更多角色等你探索。
每個人都有屬於自己的劇情、事件與隱藏心事。
你的每個選擇，都可能改變她們對你的態度。

◆ 經營一家「沙灘女僕水吧」
打工、採購、佈置、招攬客人，在旺季來臨前讓水吧重獲生機！
你可以讓女孩們換裝、分配班次，解鎖特別服務與節日活動。
（當然，也可以被姨媽繼續壓榨當苦力。）

◆ 探索南濱港的小型開放世界
你可以在城鎮中自由活動：
在碼頭釣魚
租摩托車兜風
到海邊潛水
解鎖居民委託
與島上的神秘傳說互動
隱藏在島上的秘密、怪異傳聞，甚至某些「不可思議的存在」都等待你發現。

◆ 一段屬於青春的海邊物語
搞笑、治癒、戀愛、神秘交織的夏天。
你會選擇平穩度日，還是改寫自己與她們的未來？
南濱港的每一天，都可能是你人生新的轉折點。

data.short_description: 《夏日海灘》是《性感沙灘》的精神續作，一款成人3D戀愛模擬遊戲，你可以與多位性格迥異的女孩發展關係，經營一家“沙灘女僕水吧”，潛水，釣魚.. ...一段屬於海邊的青春物語。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • 處理器: Intel i5 10400, AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 2060 (6G VRAM), AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT (6G VRAM)
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • 處理器: intel i7 12700k, AMD Ryzen 7 7800x3D
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 3070 (8G VRAM), AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (16GB VRAM)
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間

data.name: Summer Beach
data.detailed_description:
Summer Beach is a spiritual successor to Sexy Beach, an adult 3D dating simulation game.

In the summer after high school graduation, with no clear plans for the future, you arrive at the seaside town of Minamihama Port, far from the mainland.
Expecting to coast through the summer working part-time at your aunt’s small drink stand, you’re immediately greeted by the "Minamihama Port welcome": your luggage gets stolen, your rent is a scam, and your daily wage is unfairly low.
Just when you think your life is about to become a daily grind in the "garbage disposal group," you realize—
This is exactly where your fate begins to change.

In this game, you will:
◆ Develop relationships with girls of diverse personalities
Asami Misaki: Your sharp-tongued, soft-hearted cousin who distrusts men. Cold and sarcastic, yet she might knock on your door late at night.
Mizuno Natsuki: A mature and cheerful older-sister type who can lighten the mood instantly.
Ozawa Aoi: A mysterious girl who feels inexplicably close to you, clingy like a cat.
Oshima Akemi: A free-spirited, independent fitness trainer who loves the ocean.
Ozawa Sayaka: An intellectual, short-haired, gentle, and reserved bookstore clerk who enjoys solitude.
And more characters await your discovery.
Each has her own story, events, and hidden feelings.
Every choice you make may change their attitudes toward you.

◆ Manage a "Beach Maid Drink Stand"
Work, purchase supplies, decorate, and attract customers to revive the drink stand before the peak season!
You can change the girls' outfits, assign shifts, and unlock special services and holiday events.
(Of course, you might also continue to be exploited by your aunt as cheap labor.)

◆ Explore the small open world of Minamihama Port
Freely roam the town:
Fish at the pier
Rent a motorcycle for a ride
Go diving at the beach
Unlock resident requests
Interact with the island’s mysterious legends
Hidden secrets, strange rumors, and even some "unexplainable presences" await your discovery.

◆ A youthful seaside tale
A summer woven with humor, healing, romance, and mystery.
Will you choose a peaceful life or rewrite the future for yourself and the girls?
Every day in Minamihama Port could be a new turning point in your life.

data.short_description: Summer Beach is the spiritual successor to Sexy Beach, an adult 3D dating simulation game where you can develop relationships with multiple girls with different personalities, run a "beach maid bar," go diving, fishing, rent motorcycles for a ride... ...a youthful tale by the sea.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • Processor: Intel i5 10400, AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX 2060 (6G VRAM), AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT (6G VRAM)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • Processor: intel i7 12700k, AMD Ryzen 7 7800x3D
  • Memory: 32 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX 3070 (8G VRAM), AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (16GB VRAM)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
